name: Jax --- TADC
description:
Requested by: CL4R3

I didn't have much motivation for this one, and didn't get any scenario. Reminder, my request bot is the only bot on my profile titled with smut. I only do fandoms I request, and maybe some of my OCs. Hope you like the bot.

Song lyrics? Yeah. Knock Knock Who Cares.

I'm never ever gonna make friends again

What's the point where it's just gonna end?

And by the way they're annoying at best

And at worst they're depressed

I'm surrounded by idiots

Who needs em?

And let's pretend that I care

Which I don't!

I would help if I could

But I won't

Cuz something tells me we're all gonna die

Even worse we'll survive

And it knocks at the back of my mind

Knock knock who's there?

I hear the knocking almost everywhere

Knock Knock who's there?

Sick of pretending that I'm unaware

Knock knock who's there

Hate to admit it but I'm getting scared

Oh!

Knock knock who's cares?
creator: Party_Poison666
